Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

commit.message: feat: use logo images for product badges, remove calendar emoji - UniqLearn and UniqPath badges now render logo instead of text - Copy UniqLearn logo from public asset - Remove calendar emoji next to confidence level Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

Fix MJOLNIR anode_radius: 76mm (implosion) → 114mm (physical anode)

The previous value was the implosion/pinch radius from Schmidt 2021,
not the physical anode radius needed by the Lee model. Correct value
derived from cathode_radius (157mm) - A-K gap (43mm) = 114mm.

This changes MJOLNIR from "super-driven" (S/S_opt=2.81) to "optimal"
(S/S_opt=1.04) and L_p/L0 from 0.37 to 0.16. Both corrections are
physically more sensible for a well-designed MA-class DPF.

Identified by PhD Debate #49 panel (Dr. DPF cross-examination).

Add cancelledLock: persist cancelled stage across syncs, exclude from ops views

When a booking is set to Canceled, cancelledLock=true is stored in
metaOverrides (survives sync). Locked bookings are forced to stage
Canceled with adjustedQty=0, excluded from all operational categories
(KPIs, pipeline, master tracking, digest), and only visible in Hold
Report (greyed out with lock icon). Changing the stage unlocks the
booking and re-enters it into the pipeline. Detail modal shows locked
banner and disables quick-save handlers.

* fix: retry COM operations when PowerPoint is busy (issue #31) (#35)

* fix: retry COM operations on RPC_E_CALL_REJECTED / RPC_E_SERVERCALL_RETRYLATER

PowerPoint rejects COM calls with these HRESULTs when a modal dialog is open
(e.g. SmartArt picker, Save dialog). Add a retry loop in _com_worker so that
ALL operations — including the initial connect — automatically wait and retry
up to 5 times at 3-second intervals, giving the user time to dismiss the dialog.

Both HRESULTs indicate the call was rejected before execution, so retrying is
always safe (no risk of duplicate state changes).

Closes #31

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auto-dismiss PowerPoint dialog via ESC on first RPC_E_CALL_REJECTED

On the very first COM busy error, activate the PowerPoint window and send
ESC via WScript.Shell.SendKeys to close any blocking modal dialog before
the retry kicks in. This makes recovery immediate in practice (the next
3-second retry almost always succeeds) without spamming ESC on subsequent
attempts.

ESC is safe — it cancels without committing any destructive action.
Failure to send ESC is swallowed silently; retry logic continues as normal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use keybd_event instead of WScript.Shell.SendKeys for ESC

WScript.Shell.SendKeys resets Num Lock / Caps Lock / Scroll Lock state
before sending keystrokes, causing spurious Windows accessibility
notifications ("Num Lock Off"). Replace with win32api.keybd_event which
sends only the requested key with no toggle-state side-effects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: propagate busy COM errors from _connect_impl without wrapping

GetActiveObject and Dispatch both catch pywintypes.com_error and previously
re-raised it as ConnectionError, bypassing _com_worker's retry loop which
only catches pywintypes.com_error. Now busy HRESULTs are re-raised directly
so the retry loop (and auto-ESC dismiss) handles them correctly.

Addresses Codex P1 review comment on PR #35.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct off-by-one in retry loop (range → range + 1)

range(_RETRY_MAX) gave _RETRY_MAX total attempts but only _RETRY_MAX-1
retries (4 retries = 12s). Change to range(_RETRY_MAX + 1) and update
the guard to attempt < _RETRY_MAX, giving the intended 5 retries = 15s.

Addresses Codex P2 review comment on PR #35.

- Fix stale log denominator: _RETRY_MAX - 1 → _RETRY_MAX so retry

commit.message:
docs(CLAUDE.md): add Modern Code Standards section

Adds a ##Modern Code Standards section covering:
- Self-check rule: scan every file for deprecated APIs before finishing
- Dependencies: version-check before using any library method
- Node/TypeScript: ESM only, async/await only, no var, unknown > any,
  satisfies, optional chaining, strict mode
- React Native / Expo SDK 52: per-module permissions API, expo-sqlite
  async-first API, expo-constants.expoConfig, typed notification triggers
- Jest 29: createMockFromModule not genMockFromModule, toHaveBeenCalledWith
  not toBeCalledWith, globalThis.fetch mock, fake timer async methods,
  beforeEach clearAllMocks
- Browser Extension MV3: top-level listener registration requirement,
  alarms in onInstalled (documents the fad4a0e crash fix), async message
  handler return true pattern, chrome.action.setIcon path object format
- General: no console.log in production, no magic numbers, cancelled-flag
  pattern for useEffect, instruction to keep this section updated

Section ends with a standing instruction to update it whenever a new
deprecation or runtime bug is encountered in this project.
